рџЊЌ Context: mock-cluster, Namespace: petshop, Selectors: [], Config: mock, Cache: 32 calls | 0 hits | 32 misses | 0.0% hit rate

в”‚  в”њв”Ђ рџ‘€ cnp-egress: toendpoint[90m {matchLabels=app.kubernetes.io/name:petshop-db}[0m

в”‚  в””в”Ђ рџ‘€ cnp-egress: tofqdn[90m {matchName=am.kpt.petshop.com}[0m
